executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Generate and execute ALL 25 frontend test cases (TC001–TC025). Cover authentication, all student portal pages (dashboard, jobs, explore-jobs, internships, profile, applications, messages, calendar, companies, settings, saved-jobs, bookmarked-news), admin portal pages, navigation flows, logout, and the calendar API endpoint. Use /test/login-student and /test/login-admin helper routes to simulate authenticated sessions.
